title: CraftUtils
description: A utils plugin that has everything you need.
body:
![CraftUtils](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba6015c899a93555ecd3123415ca7fac0d45caa7.png)
CraftUtils is a lightweight utility plugin for Paper (latest version: 1.21.4). It provides essential commands for messaging, teleportation, and inventory management without altering vanilla commands.

## Features
- Lightweight and fast with no unnecessary bloat.  
- Vanilla-friendly and does not modify core commands.  
- Simple and user-friendly commands, accessible via `/cu`.  
- Includes a powerful Admin GUI for operator actions.  


## Commands
All commands can be accessed using `/cu`, but many  have aliases.  

### Messaging
- `/cu reply` – Reply to the last received message.  
- `/cu msg` – Send a private message to another player.  

### Teleportation
- `/cu tpask` – Send a teleport request to another player.  
- `/cu tpaccept` – Accept a teleport request.  
- `/cu tpadeny` – Deny a teleport request.  
- `/cu tpacancel` – Cancel a teleport request.  

### Inventory
- `/cu trash` – Open a trash bin inventory.  
- `/cu enderchest` – Opens your EnderChest

### Admin
- `/cu admingui` – Open an admin UI for operator actions.  

## Support & Updates
For issues, suggestions, and updates, visit our GitHub repository
